ab: Pnrdingan knkawas mpusan mpusan daha, lmawa prngagun sehu spatis ngayan Seediq ka patis pnyahan.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: Smiling ku Umin Kulas bsiyaq mbeyax skadi sehu spatis ngayan Seediq ka patis pnyahan.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年Umin Kulas。
en: I interviewed Umin Kulas, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: Mpsterung nami ka ali gdregan nii, maha ku sapah na smiling heya.
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: Mpprengo nami ciida, pgklaun kuna pusu ngayan na, desun kuna mgkela tnsapah na ma alang na duri.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: Slingun mu, malux su ryuxun ka ngayan, naqah ngayan pntasan su cbeyo peni?
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: Kesun kuna, spooda matis kari Telu de uka dungus ka ngayan kiya, qnuuqu lmawa ngayan mesa "Riso U" ma phlisun daha duri.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達他的族名，其他人還會叫他「巫先生」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \"Wu Xian Sheng,\" which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: Mesa ka Umin Kulas "Spatis kari Seediq ngayan ta naq ka bbale. Ngayan mu ge ririh pngalan luwan Seediq, tnsapah ma pnyahan nami, psmeyah ta tmngayan ngayan daha kana ka Seediq.
ch: Umin Kulas說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
en: Umin Kulas said, \"The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.\"
